title: PWK's Enhanced Winterprojekt 2025
description: This is the enhanced version of the "PWK Winterprojekt" modpack, an annual Minecraft project by PlaywithK.
body:
![PWK Winterprojekt Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2c6b0113406944a013ba6dfb8f8dd632c28d311a.png)

# PWK's Enhanced Winterprojekt 2025

This is the enhanced version of the [PWK's Winterprojekt 2025](https://modrinth.com/modpack/pwks-winterprojekt2025) modpack.

It features some additional performance mods aswell as some clientside mods for shaders, QOL and more.

## Features
- Get 3D Skins, Enhanced Graphics with shaders, ressource packs and ambient mods like Falling Leaves.
- Boost your performance with a lot of performance tweaks and QOL Features.
- Watch your way with a minimap and even a worldmap, that shows all of your progress as you go!
- Use Minecraft with a borderless window.

## Additional mods
- 3D Skin Layers
- AppleSkin
- Cubes Without Borders
- Chat Calc
- Chat Heads
- Distant Horizons
- Entity Culling
- Falling Leaves
- FerriteCore
- ImmediatelyFast
- Iris Shaders
- Indium
- Lithium
- Model Gap Fix
- Modern Fix
- Sodium
- Xaero's Worldmap
- Xaero's Minimap
- Zoomify
